_source: IHKE3409S01 (其他檢驗結果) — single-row NHI response shape
_note: Inpatient case: funC_DATE (admission) and reaL_INSPECT_DATE (sample collection) differ by 4 days. This is the row pattern that exposed the v0.6.1 lab-date bug. Sanitized 2026-06-12: dates year-shifted per file, provider/contact identifiers replaced with synthetics — rows are to be treated as fully synthetic.
